reasoning: The Philadelphia Eagles are elite contenders for Super Bowl LX (Feb 2026) as of the November 9, 2025 cutoff. They are the defending champions, having won Super Bowl LIX in February 2025. Currently, they hold a 6-2 record and are the #2 seed in the NFC entering Week 10. While they are slight underdogs (+2.5) for their upcoming Week 10 matchup against the 5-2 Green Bay Packers, they are consistently ranked in the top 3 of NFL power rankings. No major season-ending injuries to key stars like Jalen Hurts or Saquon Barkley have been reported, though minor injuries to Barkley (groin) and Dickerson (ankle) are noted. Given the competitive field (Lions, Packers, Bills, Ravens), a probability of 16% (reflecting implied betting odds around +525 to +600) is consistent with their status as one of the primary favorites.
